name: Classic (London)
notable: Monochrome. 'Classically structured resume template, for a robust career history.' Filed under /simple, whose templates are stated to use 'a clean, single-column layout' with 'a limited color scheme' and 'without icons or decorative flourishes'. PDF+DOCX. Not photo-supporting.

name: Traditional (Santiago)
notable: Monochrome. 'Classic full-page resume template with sizable resume sections.' /simple member, so no icons per category copy. PDF+DOCX.

name: Prime ATS (Helsinki)
notable: The headline ATS product: 'Professional, streamlined resume template optimized for maximum ATS compatibility and readability.' Gallery presents it as two-column, which directly contradicts the /ats page's own rule to 'Use a single-column layout instead of columns or sidebars' — marked unknown rather than resolve the source's contradiction. Correctly excluded from photo support. PDF+DOCX.

name: Pure ATS (Seoul)
notable: Named on the /ats page but with no structural description anywhere I could fetch. Recorded only because the name and ATS positioning are confirmed. No photo support. PDF+DOCX.

name: Simple ATS (Athens)
notable: 'Clean, modern template design that is easily read by ATS scanners.' The one ATS-named template whose stated single-column structure actually matches the site's own ATS advice. PDF+DOCX.

name: Precision ATS (Prague)
notable: 'Showcase career skills through a highlighted skills section. ATS-optimized resume template.' Two-column per gallery — an ATS-branded template built on the layout the /ats page tells users to avoid. A 'highlighted skills section' hints at skill visuals but I found no evidence of rating bars. PDF+DOCX.

name: Two Column ATS (Brussels)
notable: The sharpest example of the source's ATS contradiction — the column structure is in the product name while the /ats page says single-column. 'A simple, two-tone resume template. Easy to read and highlights your experience.' Two-tone = likely 1 accent hue, but unverified. PDF+DOCX.

name: Header ATS (Shanghai)
notable: 'Dedicated achievements section to highlight successes. Use an ATS-optimized template.' Distinctive for carving out a named achievements section rather than folding wins into experience bullets — worth stealing. Structure otherwise unverified. PDF+DOCX.

name: Clean (Berlin)
notable: 'Modern resume template with bold, clean formatting.' Monochrome. Marked hybrid because resume.io contradicts itself: listed on BOTH /two-column AND /simple (which claims single-column). Also branded 'Monochrome (Berlin)' on the /modern page — a third name for the same template. Not photo-supporting despite not being ATS-branded.

name: Professional (Dublin)
notable: 'A touch of personality with a well-organized resume structure.' Appears on /two-column, /picture and /professional — consistently categorized, unlike most. PDF+DOCX.

name: Corporate (New York)
notable: 'Professional and elegant resume template with a timeline structure.' The timeline treatment for experience entries is the distinctive device here and the only template in the catalog claiming it — timelines typically imply a vertical rule with date markers, but I could not verify date placement. PDF+DOCX.

name: Clear (Vienna)
notable: 'Striking modern header, professional two column template structure.' Explicitly sells the header band as the differentiator — the recurring resume.io creative device. PDF+DOCX.

name: Essential (Stockholm)
notable: BEST-EVIDENCED TEMPLATE and the house crowd-favorite. updates.resume.io confirms verbatim: 'Introduced color-coded progress bars for the skills section', 'Icons now highlight the main resume sections (profile, education etc.)' and 'Multi-color design support added!... (affects links and skill levels)'. So icons + skill bars + user-selectable accent hue are confirmed, not inferred. Progress-bar skill ratings are the classic ATS-hostile pattern to avoid stealing. PDF+DOCX.

name: Modern (Tokyo)
notable: 'Tech-inspired design, minimalist page, skill-point visuals' — 'skill-point visuals' is verbatim resume.io copy and is the only other direct evidence of skill rating graphics in the catalog. Listed on /two-column despite the gallery implying single-column. PDF only.

name: Elegant (Barcelona)
notable: 'Attractive, friendly template design. Creative two column structure.' PDF only — part of the design-led PDF-only tier with no Word export.

name: Vivid (Madrid)
notable: 'Powerful modern resume template with bold section highlights.' Filed under /creative, whose shared formula is 'a strong block of color at the top' and 'flashy color used throughout' — so 'section highlights' likely means filled color bands behind headings, but the rendering is unverified. PDF only.

name: Statement (Geneva)
notable: 'Minimalist font styling contrasts with an electric background in this edgy resume template.' The only template selling a full saturated background rather than an accent band — maximum ink coverage, and the worst-case candidate for both ATS parsing and printing. PDF only.

name: Half Tone (Copenhagen)
notable: 'Emphasizing your personal story above all else, this template blends a traditional style with attention-grabbing design.' Named for a tonal split rather than a sidebar — the two-tone block treatment appears to weight the profile/story section over the experience list. PDF only.

name: Double Column
notable: Blue accent. Enhancv's flagship two-column and the one their ATS blog explicitly defends ('98% vs 95%' parse claim). Photo page confirms 'customizable colors, backgrounds, and icons available' — the only icon attribution outside Timeline. Pitched at tech/consulting. skill bars unverified.

name: Ivy League
notable: Grey accent. Harvard-inspired; the restrained option Enhancv steers finance/law toward. Icons/skill bars unverified (false = no evidence, not confirmed absent).

name: Single Column
notable: Green accent. UK copy: 'maximum clarity... where readability is paramount'; photo page notes 'highlighted headings' — the only heading hint found anywhere, too vague to record as heading_treatment. Icons/skill bars unverified.

name: Elegant
notable: Blue sidebar for highlights/strengths. DIRECT SOURCE CONFLICT: main gallery says two-column, /photo/ page says 'single-column focused design with a dedicated side column'. Recorded as two-column-sidebar since a dedicated side column IS a sidebar. Icons/skill bars unverified.

name: Modern
notable: Only evidenced multi-hue template (orange/blue). Same conflict as Elegant: gallery says 'two-column with orange/blue accents', /photo/ page calls it 'single-column format' and 'Enhancv's top choice among users for three years straight'. Icons/skill bars unverified.

name: Polished
notable: Rust/red LEFT column — the only warm-toned sidebar in the catalogue. Results-focused, aimed at sales/BD/client-facing. Icons/skill bars unverified.

name: Timeline
notable: BEST-EVIDENCED TEMPLATE — the only individual page that resolved (/resume-templates/timeline/). Blue accent. Confirmed: single-column, no photo in the base render, icons present, no skill bars mentioned, plus a 'background pattern to establish harmony and balance' and 'a vertical line to lead the recruiter's eye' through reverse-chronological experience. A decorative background pattern under a template badged ATS-friendly is the single most aggressive parsing claim in the set.

name: Creative
notable: Purple accent. US and UK copy disagree on positioning: US says 'purple accents with photo option for creative fields'; UK says 'bold coloured header that makes your name stand out... perfect for executives'. The bold coloured header implies a reversed/banded name treatment but the copy never says so, so name_treatment is omitted rather than guessed. Columns never stated.

name: Contemporary
notable: Green accent. UK copy is explicit and unusually useful: 'a bolder two-column CV template designed to accommodate a photo seamlessly' — one of the few templates where photo is a designed-in slot rather than a toggle. Customer-facing/sales/creative.

name: Stylish
notable: Blue accent. Galleries contradict each other on purpose: US calls it 'clean, recruiter-friendly layout'; UK calls it 'a compact one-page template with space for technical skills and project highlights' for engineers/developers. Columns never stated in either.

name: Compact
notable: Blue accent. Defined by density not structure — 'tighter margins to fit more detail on one page' for strict one-page expectations. Columns never stated.

name: Classic
notable: Grey single column, explicitly 'conservative design that never goes out of style' for law/finance/public sector/academic. The most restrained item in the catalogue.

name: High Performer
notable: The most structurally unusual template: 'data-driven... with structured tables to showcase measurable impact' (US copy adds 'visual elements/tables'). Tables are a genuine ATS parsing hazard, yet it carries the same blanket ATS badge. Columns and accent hue never stated — accent_colors 0 means unstated, not achromatic. Whether the 'visual elements' include rating graphics is exactly what I could not verify.

name: Minimal
notable: Light blue, 'minimal design with whitespace'. US gallery only — absent from the UK CV gallery. Columns never stated.

name: Crest
notable: US gallery only, absent from UK. The thinnest evidence of any template I recorded — copy is just 'traditional layout with executive feel'. No columns, no accent, no photo info. Recorded because the name and card genuinely appeared, but I know almost nothing about it.

name: Ivy League with Photo
notable: Variant of Ivy League skeleton — 'classic layout plus subtle photo'. Grey accent assumed inherited from parent but not independently stated.

name: Ivy League with Logos
notable: Variant: 'updated Harvard-style with company logos'. Employer logos are raster images inside the experience block — another silent ATS-badge tension, since logo images carry no parseable text for the employer name.

name: Single Column with Photo
notable: Variant: photo placed at top. One of the few placement facts the galleries actually state.

name: Double Column with Logos
notable: Called out on BOTH galleries as 'Enhancv's most popular layout' / 'one of Enhancv's most popular templates'. Their single most-promoted product is simultaneously two-column AND logo-image-bearing AND ATS-badged — the sharpest illustration of how far their ATS claim stretches.

name: Elegant with Logos
notable: Aqua accent — the only aqua in the catalogue, so the logo variant does not simply inherit Elegant's blue. Two-column with company logos, aimed at senior professionals.

name: Timeline with Logos
notable: Green accent — again diverges from parent Timeline's blue, confirming logo variants get their own palette rather than inheriting. 'Clean timeline format with company logos'.

name: Clean elegant resume
notable: NOT VISUALLY EXAMINED — name and description only, from the Microsoft Word blog 'The best resume format in 2026' (word.cloud.microsoft/create/en/blog/best-resume-formats/). Microsoft describes it as a 'clean, professional resume' that highlights 'experience, skills, and achievements in a clear format'. All boolean/visual fields are placeholders, not observations.
src: Microsoft Create / Microsoft Word resume templates

name: Modern basic resume
notable: NOT VISUALLY EXAMINED — name and description only, same blog source. Described as a 'modern resume template designed to keep experience organized and easy to scan'. All boolean/visual fields are placeholders, not observations.
src: Microsoft Create / Microsoft Word resume templates

name: Simple sales resume
notable: NOT VISUALLY EXAMINED — name and description only, same blog source. Described as a 'structured, easy-to-follow layout that highlights strengths at a glance'. All boolean/visual fields are placeholders, not observations.
src: Microsoft Create / Microsoft Word resume templates

name: Organized modern resume
notable: NAME ONLY — no description, no design seen. Evidenced solely by a real Microsoft URL surfaced in search (create.microsoft.com/en-us/template/organized-modern-resume-b697246c-e3c8-492a-9994-f51e1b425a22); fetching it 301-redirects to a generic m365.cloud.microsoft/create landing page with no template detail. Confirms per-template pages exist as URLs but no longer serve inspectable content. All boolean/visual fields are placeholders, not observations.
src: Microsoft Create / Microsoft Word resume templates

name: Minimalist White and Grey Professional Resume
heading_treatment: allcaps letterspaced, each heading's first letter sits on a grey rounded-square block
name_treatment: large-centered, wide letterspacing, with a light script monogram overlapping behind it
notable: The script-monogram-behind-the-name device is the only ornament in an otherwise monochrome page. Education dates sit above the institution while work dates are right-aligned — two date conventions in one document. Skeleton is reused verbatim by two other templates in this gallery.

name: Black and White Simple Business School Graduate Corporate Resume
heading_treatment: allcaps small, bold, sandwiched between full-width rules
name_treatment: large-left bold sans
notable: The most parser-safe layout in the sample: contact is one inline dot-separated text line under the name, no icons, no graphics. Single column throughout except a 50/50 Education/Extracurricular split at the very bottom. 'Key Competencies' is a 3-column word grid — the one weak point.

name: Red Black Bold Graphic Designer Resume
heading_treatment: red allcaps bold, no rule
name_treatment: huge red uppercase across two lines with a red script signature overlapping it
notable: Most typographically aggressive of the set — name occupies roughly a fifth of the page. Bracketed '[ RESUME ]' label top-left and bracketed dates '[ 2020 - PRESENT ]' are a consistent motif. B/W portrait top-right keeps the palette to one hue. Warm grey paper, not white.

name: Gray and White Simple Clean Resume
heading_treatment: serif allcaps letterspaced with a short rule underneath
name_treatment: large-left serif, mixed weight (light first name + bold surname)
notable: Full-width centered SUMMARY spans both columns before the page splits into sidebar + content — a useful hybrid move. Contact sits top-right as dark filled circular icon badges. Mixed-weight name (ISABEL **MERCADO**) is a recurring Canva trick for hierarchy without color.

name: Modern Professional CV Resume
heading_treatment: titlecase bold with a small icon to the left and a blue rule underneath
name_treatment: large blue, stacked two lines, inside the grey sidebar
notable: Only template using a vertical timeline rail with blue dots down the experience column. Circular photo notched into a blue triangular corner block. Icons extend to section headings, not just contact. Same skeleton as Minimalist White and Grey, reskinned in blue with a photo.

name: Black and White Simple Infographic Resume
heading_treatment: italic caps inside a rounded grey pill band spanning the full width
name_treatment: large-left bold, role beneath in bold caps
notable: Named 'Infographic' but contains zero infographic elements — no charts, bars, or icons. The name is pure SEO. Structurally one of the cleanest single-column resumes in the gallery; the rounded pill heading bands are its only styling.

name: Black and White Minimalist Professional Accountant Resume
heading_treatment: allcaps bold, no rule
name_treatment: large-left uppercase bold set in a pale grey band across the top
notable: The rare right-hand sidebar — Contact/Skills/Languages sit right while Education/Work Experience take the wider left column. Full-width 'About Me' above the split. Skills are subdivided into 'Professional' and 'Personal' groups. Ships with lorem ipsum in every body block.

name: Black and White Corporate Resume
heading_treatment: allcaps letterspaced bold with a rule underneath
name_treatment: large-left, mixed weight (bold RICHARD + light SANCHEZ)
notable: Canva's house skeleton in its plainest form — structurally identical to Minimalist White and Grey and Modern Professional CV minus color and photo. Small bullet dots mark each experience entry like a timeline. Two-up References block at the bottom. Body copy is lorem ipsum.

name: Blue and Gray Simple Professional CV Resume
heading_treatment: allcaps bold preceded by a filled navy circular icon badge, navy rule underneath
name_treatment: reversed-on-band — white caps on a dark navy block occupying the top-right
notable: Only template in the sample reversing the name out of a dark band. Circular photo straddles the navy block and the grey sidebar. Icon badges sit on a continuous vertical timeline rail. Highest ATS risk of the set: sidebar + reversed header + badge glyphs.

name: White Modern Business Administration Resume
heading_treatment: high-contrast display serif caps (fashion-magazine style), no rule
name_treatment: very large display serif, stacked two lines, flush left
notable: The most distinctive type in the gallery — a Vogue-style high-contrast didone with a decorative ligature, used for both name and headings. Content splits 50/50 (Education|Skills, then two experience columns) rather than sidebar+main. Full-width rules band the page into horizontal registers. Black circular contact icons top-right.

name: Systems Design Resume in White Black Simple Style
heading_treatment: small bold caps with a full-width rule underneath
name_treatment: large-left bold sans, role beneath in letterspaced caps
notable: Deliberately unstyled and the better for it — hollow circle bullets are the only decorative choice. Contact is a plain two-column text block, no icons. Single column except 50/50 splits for Academic History and Certification. Part of Canva's '...Resume in [Color] [Style]' naming series.

name: White and Blue Minimalist Professional Corporate ATS Resume
heading_treatment: allcaps bold inside a full-width pale blue-grey band
name_treatment: large-centered bold, role centered beneath
notable: The only template in the entire gallery that self-labels ATS. Mostly earns it — single column, no photo, no icons, no bars, inline pipe-separated contact line. Undermined by a 3-column 'Key Skills' grid at the foot, exactly the construct most likely to linearize incorrectly.

name: White and Pastel Teal Minimalist Resume
heading_treatment: allcaps widely letterspaced, no rule
name_treatment: large-centered, very wide letterspacing, set in a pastel teal band
notable: The sample's lone skill-bar template — six teal bars with no scale, axis, or legend, so they assert proficiency without defining it (worth avoiding). Dates live in a dedicated left gutter beside each entry. Contact is relegated to a footer line at the very bottom, unusual and ATS-hostile. Serif body throughout.

name: White Gold Elegant Minimalist Data Analyst Resume CV A4 Printable
heading_treatment: gold allcaps letterspaced with a gold hairline rule underneath
name_treatment: large-centered letterspaced, split two-tone — gold given name, black surname
notable: The two-tone name split by color (not weight) is a clean, cheap hierarchy trick worth stealing. Gold hairline rules band the page. Skills sit in a 2x2 grid of paired columns. Ships unfinished — all eight skill slots still read 'Your Skill Here' and body copy is lorem ipsum.

name: Marketing and Sales Resume in White Dark Orange Simple Style
heading_treatment: rust-orange serif titlecase with a matching rule underneath
name_treatment: large-left rust serif with italic flourish, role beneath in small caps
notable: Editorial rather than corporate — serif name and serif headings in rust give it a magazine masthead feel. Contact is a labeled block top-right instead of an icon row. Single column with 50/50 splits for Academic History and Awards. Same naming series as the Systems Design and Science templates.

name: White Beige Minimalist Professional Resume
heading_treatment: allcaps letterspaced with a black rule underneath
name_treatment: large-centered serif, wide letterspacing, role centered beneath in caps
notable: A single beige band holding the pipe-separated contact line is the only color on the page — a restrained way to buy one accent. Justified body text (rare here, and it opens up ugly word gaps). Otherwise a textbook single-column layout. Generic placeholders ('Really great company', 'job position here').

name: IT Manager CV Resume
heading_treatment: allcaps bold, no rule, set on alternating sage and beige blocks
name_treatment: large serif on a sage band, top-right, role beneath in caps
notable: The most heavily art-directed template surveyed and the only one using two accent hues (sage + beige). Full-bleed color blocks, a large rectangular photo (not circular), and a dedicated footer contact bar with icons. Visually the strongest, structurally the riskiest for parsing.

name: Science and Engineering Resume in Green Black Simple Style
heading_treatment: teal-green allcaps with a green rule underneath
name_treatment: large-centered serif, role beneath in letterspaced caps
notable: Centered italic summary paragraph gives it an academic CV register. Employers and institutions set in green italic — accent color carries semantic weight rather than being purely decorative, the sharpest use of a single hue in the sample. Contact is a plain 3-column labeled row.

name: Creative
heading_treatment: allcaps + short underline rule, gold on white
name_treatment: large-left, reversed white on dark navy band
notable: Full-bleed navy header band with gold circle-ringed photo; second darker navy sub-band for contacts. Skills are navy pill chips. Languages encoded as segmented filled squares (graphical only, no text level). Faint geometric chevron watermark bleeding off the bottom edge. Dates italic gold left, location right-aligned on the same line.

name: Modern
heading_treatment: allcaps black + full-width hairline rule
name_treatment: large-centered-ish beside photo, title-case, light weight
notable: Rounded-square photo top-left, contacts right-aligned with icons trailing (icon after text — unusual). Experience uses a genuine timeline: open circles on a vertical rule plus bracket enclosures around achievement blocks. Languages as 5-dot ratings (filled/hollow). Hobbies as outlined pills. Coral is the sole accent.

name: Executive
heading_treatment: allcaps teal, no rule
name_treatment: large-left, black, grey subtitle beneath
notable: Summary sits ABOVE the contact strip — a full-width light-grey band of icon+text contacts acts as a divider. Teal skill pills. Interests use small line-art icons. Orange external-link glyphs clash slightly with the teal system. Languages given as text proficiency labels, not graphics — better ATS behaviour than most.

name: Minimalist
heading_treatment: allcaps black + diamond icon + long rule with diamond endcaps
name_treatment: large-left, title-case, light weight
notable: Despite the name, the least minimal heading treatment in the set: every section gets a blue diamond glyph plus a full-width rule terminated by a second diamond. Diamond-outline bullets too. Slate-blue skill pills against coral dates/subtitle. One of only two single-column layouts — genuinely the safest ATS pick here.

name: Professional
heading_treatment: allcaps black, no rule
name_treatment: large-left, steel blue, coral subtitle, with a blue square block anchoring the top-left corner
notable: Photo is an organic blob/squircle with a coral outline — the most distinctive photo frame in the range. Coral square blocks sit in the left margin marking each entry (decorative, not a timeline). Blue-grey skill pills. A single blue rule separates header from body. Sample text has a visible typo ('Pro.rapher').

name: College
heading_treatment: allcaps coral + short coral underline rule
name_treatment: large-left, coral, grey subtitle
notable: Education deliberately placed ABOVE Work Experience — the only template in the set to reorder for students. Solid coral fill on skill pills (heavier than the tinted pills elsewhere). Strictly one accent hue. Languages as text proficiency labels in coral italic. Dates italic left with location right-aligned.

name: Basic
heading_treatment: allcaps dark teal, no rule
name_treatment: large-left, black, grey subtitle
notable: Contact strip bounded by hairline rules top and bottom rather than filled with colour — the most restrained header in the set. Skills are a plain two-column text grid with NO pills, the only template to do so. Interests as outlined pills. Single dark-teal accent. Arguably the most genuinely ATS-safe of the two-column options.

name: Simple
heading_treatment: allcaps blue, no rule
name_treatment: large-left, black, blue subtitle
notable: Full-width solid blue contact band (reversed white icons+text) is the only strong colour block. Technical Skills are bolded subcategory headers with plain text beneath, while General Skills get blue-grey pills — a rare hybrid of both treatments in one template. Small horizontal dashes in the left margin mark each entry.

name: Functional
heading_treatment: allcaps teal + full-width teal rule
name_treatment: reversed-on-band, large-left, white on teal with underline rule
notable: Full-bleed teal header band, then a narrow LEFT sidebar that is unfilled (white) — sidebar structure without sidebar shading. Solid teal competency pills. Languages as segmented filled squares (graphical only). Leads with Skills Summary and pushes Professional Experience to the very bottom — true functional ordering, matching the name.

name: Tech
heading_treatment: allcaps + circular outline icon, no rule
name_treatment: large, title-case, inside a grey rounded card
notable: The only template with REAL skill progress bars — horizontal fills with an axis tick scale across the top, showing partial fills for Adobe CS and WordPress. Right sidebar in grey; dark slate contact card with teal-ringed circular icons. Arch-shaped photo with teal ring on pink. Rounded card panels throughout and a small teal dot joining header to body. The most ATS-hostile layout in the range.

name: Skill-Based
heading_treatment: allcaps; white + white circular icon in sidebar, navy + navy circular icon in main column
name_treatment: large-left, navy, title-case, light-blue subtitle
notable: Dark navy LEFT sidebar with a light-blue vertical accent stripe running its full height. Entire hard-skills list lives in the reversed sidebar (ATS risk). Soft skills as grey pills. Main column has a timeline: filled blue dots on a vertical connector. Dates italic blue left with location right-aligned blue.

name: IT
heading_treatment: allcaps blue + rounded-square icon + segmented tricolour rule (coral/blue/coral)
name_treatment: large-left, steel blue, coral subtitle
notable: Body is full-width single column but a blue rounded contact card floats top-right, so the header reads two-column while the content does not. The tricolour segmented rules are unique in the set. Faint square/circuit-board watermark drifts across the whole page. Coral square bullets; blue-grey skill pills. Six contact channels including GitHub and Stack Overflow.

name: Rezi — Modern
heading_treatment: allcaps + full-width horizontal rule
name_treatment: large, accent-colored (blue), left-aligned
notable: Directly disproves my first WebFetch, which claimed 'two-column design with photo option' — the render is unambiguously single-column, no photo. Docs: 'A subtle splash of color gives this one a fresh, modern look. You can customize the accent color or font.' Pitched at tech/dev.

name: Rezi — Harvard
heading_treatment: allcaps + rule, CENTERED (distinctive vs rest of gallery)
name_treatment: centered, bold, moderate size
notable: Only Rezi template with centered section headings — docs: 'Centered headings give it a unique look.' Pure black/no accent. Education-first for students/grads.

name: Rezi — Jake's Resume
heading_treatment: allcaps + rule
name_treatment: centered
notable: Explicit in copy: 'high-density, single-column layout.' Port of the well-known Overleaf LaTeX resume 'now available without LaTeX coding.' Docs: 'dates and locations are moved off to the side.'

name: Rezi — Standard
heading_treatment: allcaps + rule; 'clear dividers' (Dividers toggle ON by default)
name_treatment: centered, bold serif
notable: Rezi's most popular / default. Docs: 'The classic. The little black dress of resumes — timeless, clean, and universally flattering.' This is the render I inspected most closely.

name: Rezi — Simple
heading_treatment: allcaps + rule
name_treatment: centered
notable: Explicitly stated 'single-column structure' with 'open space to guide a recruiter'. Minimalist / negative-space play.

name: Rezi — Highlight
heading_treatment: emphasized headings (docs); exact treatment not verified visually
name_treatment: emphasized name (docs)
notable: Docs: 'Your name and section headings are emphasized for quick navigation. It's clean, structured.' Uses subtle color accents. Columns NOT visually verified — not asserting.

name: Rezi — Highlight Compact
heading_treatment: emphasized headings
name_treatment: emphasized name
notable: Docs-only template (not in main gallery grid): 'Same design as the Highlight template, but with a more condensed layout. Title, company, location, and dates are on a single line.' The inline-date variant.

name: Rezi — Bold
heading_treatment: unknown
name_treatment: unknown
notable: Docs: 'A single bold line of color at the top adds personality' with '12 color options, indent the bullets.' Note how restrained Rezi's idea of 'Bold'/creative is — one color rule, not a sidebar.

name: Rezi — Bright
heading_treatment: unknown
name_treatment: unknown
notable: Stated: 'bold color strip at the top' and keeps 'job titles, companies, and dates on one line.' Marketed for fashion/media/arts yet still 'fully parsable by ATS'.

name: Rezi — Compact
heading_treatment: unknown
name_treatment: unknown
notable: Docs: 'engineered to accommodate 20% more content per page compared to the Standard template' via 'clever layout and optimized spacing.' Density achieved WITHOUT resorting to a second column — the key contrast vs design-led galleries.

name: Rezi — Alternative
heading_treatment: unknown
name_treatment: unknown
notable: Docs-only (not in gallery grid): 'Features a subtle geometric design at the top, which is ideal for creative roles.'

name: Rezi — Basic
heading_treatment: unknown
name_treatment: unknown
notable: Name+description evidence only (DOM-verified in 'Recruiter favorites'): 'A traditional resume format that recruiters instantly recognize and trust… fully ATS-optimized.'

name: Rezi — Minimalist
heading_treatment: unknown
name_treatment: unknown
notable: Name+description evidence only: 'Maximizes page space for dense information. Ideal for seasoned professionals with a lot to say.'

name: Rezi — Smart
heading_treatment: unknown
name_treatment: unknown
notable: Name+description evidence only (DOM 'Tech & startup ready'): 'designed to highlight linear career progression… uses clear headers and robust spacing.'

name: Rezi — Neat
heading_treatment: unknown
name_treatment: unknown
notable: Name+description evidence only: 'A timeless, ATS-compliant resume format engineered for large organizations' that 'guarantees parsing accuracy'.

name: Rezi — Trendy
heading_treatment: unknown
name_treatment: unknown
notable: Name+description evidence only: 'Engaging and personable, using softer colors and playful graphics. Suited for customer-facing roles.' 'Playful graphics' is the strongest decoration claim anywhere in Rezi's copy — I could NOT visually verify what it amounts to.

name: Rezi — Maximum
heading_treatment: unknown
name_treatment: unknown
notable: Name+description evidence only (DOM 'High-density layouts'): 'A sophisticated design that commands authority… elegant typography and optimal spacing.' Executive-targeted.

name: Rezi — Structured
heading_treatment: unknown
name_treatment: unknown
notable: Name+description evidence only: 'A highly organized layout defined by sleek lines and clear compartmentalization.' 'Compartmentalization' hints at rules/boxes, not columns — unverified.

name: Rezi — Accent
heading_treatment: unknown
name_treatment: unknown
notable: Name+description evidence only (DOM 'For design & marketing'): 'A contemporary layout that helps build your personal brand… uses subtle color accents to highlight key sections.'

name: Rezi — Vibrant
heading_treatment: unknown
name_treatment: unknown
notable: Name+description evidence only: 'Bright and inviting design that breaks away from the traditional. Perfect for new graduates or those in casual fields.'

name: Standard Resume — Sidney
heading_treatment: clean left-aligned section headers, sans-serif
name_treatment: monogram/initials with customizable color
notable: Their most popular template. Explicit: 'the one-column layout with generous whitespace because it's easy to scan and identify relevant information.' Font LFT Etica. 'Custom monogram color personalization.' Seen in gallery screenshot (card 1).

name: Standard Resume — Georgia
heading_treatment: bold modern headers in Poppins (geometric sans)
name_treatment: oversized initials in the header, with color
notable: THE key counterexample: explicit 'two-column layout with a sidebar is an effective use of space.' Copy tries to have it both ways — 'as eye-catching as an infographic resume and as easy to read as a traditional resume,' 'without annoying recruiters or breaking applicant tracking systems.' The only ATS mention on the whole site, and it's defending a two-column design. Verified in gallery screenshot (card 3).

name: Standard Resume — Seymore
heading_treatment: DM Serif Display serif headings, generous whitespace
name_treatment: large name alongside header photo — 'makes a bold statement'
notable: Explicitly 'our most popular photo resume template' using a 'one-column-split resume layout' (mapped to hybrid — split header, single body). DM Serif Display + Inter. That a photo template is their most popular says the audience isn't ATS-anxious.

name: Standard Resume — Pender
heading_treatment: unknown
name_treatment: unknown
notable: 'Modern, simple, and clean.' Distinctive feature is 'an oversized summary statement section' with 'neatly formatted work experience.' Seen in gallery screenshot (card 2) but resolution too low to call column count — not asserting.

name: Standard Resume — Parker
heading_treatment: Barlow (heading and body)
name_treatment: customizable header colors
notable: 'Crisp, clear, and to the point.' 'A modern take on a classic resume template, created in collaboration with Gergely Orosz' (author of The Tech Resume Inside Out). Aimed at grads/entry-level.

name: Standard Resume — Venables
heading_treatment: IBM Plex Serif headings, IBM Plex Sans body
name_treatment: unknown
notable: 'Professional, experienced, and established.' Also a Gergely Orosz collaboration. Emphasizes 'large company names and job titles'; explicitly built for MULTI-PAGE use by 'executives, managers, and other experienced professionals' — a rare gallery that doesn't fetishize one page. Custom accent color.

name: Standard Resume — Keefer
heading_treatment: monospace
name_treatment: unknown
notable: 'Technical, minimal, and unique.' Uses 'a monospace font' to 'stand out, without compromising the simplicity' — differentiating via typeface choice alone rather than layout gimmicks. Worth stealing.

name: Standard Resume — Cordova
heading_treatment: EB Garamond headings, Inter body
name_treatment: unknown
notable: 'Cordova is our most elegant template… well suited for designers and other professions where applying with a boring resume won't cut it.' 'The minimalist layout, editable color scheme, and striking typography' — again, differentiation via type/color, not structure.

name: Doodle
heading_treatment: titlecase, small, accent-coral, no rule
name_treatment: large-centered beside small circular photo, accent coral
notable: Full-width line-art floral doodle illustration across the top ~15% of the page. Language proficiency as coral percentage rings (100%/80%/40%). Hobbies rendered as coral pictograms. The illustration is pure decoration and would be dropped by any parser.

name: Nature
heading_treatment: icon + label inside an outlined tab/box
name_treatment: reversed white over photographic mountain band
notable: Worst ATS case in the set despite alt text claiming otherwise — the name and all contact details are reversed over a photographic header band. Skills are solid black filled bars. Grayscale/monochrome; the photo IS the color.

name: Bubbles
heading_treatment: rounded pill/badge with leading icon
name_treatment: large-left, plain black
notable: The only genuinely multi-hue template examined — pink, tan and blue translucent circles bleed off all four page edges. Headings sit in soft blue-gray pills. Skills as dot-on-line sliders.

name: Dotts
heading_treatment: allcaps + leading dot marker, accent coral
name_treatment: large-centered beside circular photo, plain black
notable: Large pink translucent circles scattered as background decoration. Skill ratings are 5-dot rows (filled/hollow). One of only three all-caps heading treatments in the catalog.

name: Blurred
heading_treatment: titlecase bold + leading icon
name_treatment: large-left over blurred orange/yellow gradient band
notable: Header is a soft-focus orange-to-yellow gradient wash. Mixes two rating idioms on one page: slider bars for software, percentage rings for languages.

name: Pipeline
heading_treatment: left-rail titlecase in accent brown, hairline rule across content
name_treatment: reversed white on solid brown band beside circular photo
notable: Narrow left rail carries ONLY section labels; all content sits right. Geometric thin-line polygon pattern behind the header band. Core strengths as percentage rings; social media as pictograms.

name: Postcard
heading_treatment: leading icon + bold titlecase + rule
name_treatment: large-left stacked on TWO lines, each underlined with its own rule
notable: Distinctive name treatment — first and last name on separate lines, each with an individual underline rule. Photo is square in a thin frame with an overlapping outline circle. Yellow corner accent block. Strengths as outlined chips, languages as rings.

name: Ribbon
heading_treatment: leading dot/icon + titlecase accent green + rule
name_treatment: reversed white on green ribbon banner with folded tails, beside circular photo
notable: Literal ribbon/banner graphic with folded-back tails behind the name. Dates in a left gutter. Languages as green percentage rings; strengths as filled green chips.

name: iMessage
heading_treatment: chat speech-bubble with tail — blue in left column, gray in right
name_treatment: large-left, plain black
notable: Most conceptually distinctive in the catalog: section headings are iMessage chat bubbles with tails, blue for the left column and gray for the right, echoing sent/received messages. A small blue bubble glyph floats near the photo. Skills as blue sliders, strengths as rings.

name: Ladder
heading_treatment: left-rail allcaps teal on black vertical band
name_treatment: large-left black beside circular monogram
notable: Only template that replaces the photo with a MONOGRAM circle (initials 'J | B' in a ringed roundel) — worth stealing for photo-averse markets. Solid black left rail holds all section labels in teal all-caps. Skills as 5-dot teal ratings.

name: Polygon
heading_treatment: leading icon + bold titlecase + rule
name_treatment: large-left over green low-poly geometric band
notable: Low-poly faceted triangle mesh fills the header band; the dominant color is explicitly customizable. Runs slider bars for software AND percentage rings for languages on the same page.

name: Puddle
heading_treatment: allcaps bold + leading icon, on yellow field
name_treatment: ALLCAPS large-left, heavy black on saturated yellow band
notable: Boldest in the catalog — full-bleed saturated yellow page with black type. Skills as yellow filled bars. The all-caps black name on yellow is the highest-contrast header here; also the heaviest ink load to print.

name: Sharp
heading_treatment: leading icon + bold titlecase + full-width rule
name_treatment: large-left, plain black
notable: One of only two genuinely ATS-defensible designs — no photo, single content column, no rating graphics, skills as a plain 4-up text grid. Decoration limited to muted pink/tan corner blocks at top-right and bottom-right that never touch the text.

name: Smart
heading_treatment: small circular icon + titlecase + rule
name_treatment: large-left, plain black
notable: Entire page carries a beige/tan background fill rather than an accent band. No photo. Strengths as tan filled chips — no rating graphics. Prints as a solid full-page color wash.

name: Green
heading_treatment: CENTERED titlecase accent green flanked by rules on both sides
name_treatment: large-left accent green beside circular photo
notable: Sits in the ATS-friendly category yet carries a photo — a direct contradiction of the claim. Otherwise conservative: no icons, no rating graphics, dates in a left gutter. Centered headings with symmetric flanking rules are unusual here.

name: Basic
heading_treatment: centered titlecase with rules above and below
name_treatment: large-left, plain black
notable: The only zero-accent design — pure black on white. No icons, no rating graphics, strengths as pipe-separated text. But it still ships a square photo despite being marketed as ATS-friendly, which is the single clearest claim/layout contradiction in the free tier.

name: Gradient
heading_treatment: bold titlecase in accent red, no rule
name_treatment: large-left over pink-to-peach gradient band, beside circular photo
notable: Gallery copy explicitly sells the top gradient plus 'clear icons' as the hook. Skills are dot-on-line sliders; interests as a 2-column pictogram grid; languages as text pairs (name + Native/Limited) rather than graphics.

name: Rhubarb
heading_treatment: bold titlecase in accent blue
name_treatment: large-left, white reversed on black
notable: Full-bleed BLACK page, white body text, blue headings, with a bright blue vertical stripe down the right edge. Inverted color scheme is unique in the catalog. No rating graphics — skills as text pairs, strengths as outlined white chips. Enormous ink cost; reversed body text is a print and parse liability.

name: Stanford
heading_treatment: leading dot/icon + titlecase in accent maroon
name_treatment: large-centered serif beside small circular photo
notable: Filed under 'Simple' but is not simple — carries a photo, section icons, hobby pictograms and segmented maroon skill bars. Serif name in academic maroon. The only true single-column design with no date gutter.

name: Compact
heading_treatment: allcaps small in accent red, no rule
name_treatment: large-centered in accent red
notable: The other genuinely ATS-safe design alongside Sharp — no photo, no icons, no rating graphics, skills as a plain 4-up text grid. Contact line uses red dot separators. Densest text-per-page ratio examined.

name: Europe
heading_treatment: bold titlecase + full-width rule
name_treatment: large-left in accent olive/gold
notable: Free tier, no photo — sensible for a Europass-adjacent design, though ironically European CV convention usually expects one. Languages as text pairs (Native/Full/Professional), strengths as olive filled chips. No rating graphics.

name: Martinus
heading_treatment: leading icon + bold serif titlecase + rule
name_treatment: large-left serif beside square photo
notable: Thick red-orange horizontal divider bar separates the header from the body — a clean structural device. Serif body throughout. Strengths as outlined red chips; no rating graphics at all despite the two-column creative layout.

name: +60 Resume/CV Templates (Rebeca Sousa)
heading_treatment: titlecase bold, no rule
name_treatment: centered under circular photo in the variant legible on the cover
notable: Curated collection, not one design. Cover collage shows card-based entries with thick colored outlines (purple/pink/blue/yellow), floating tool-icon badges around a circular photo, and pill tags. Because the cover is an angled collage, per-template attributes here are aggregate impressions, not a single spec. 35.3k users, CC BY 4.0.

name: CV Resume Template (Coverse / Hani Husamuddin)
heading_treatment: titlecase bold
name_treatment: reversed-on-band, large-left white on navy
notable: Dark navy full-bleed left sidebar holds name/summary/education/skills; experience runs in the white right column. Skills are rounded pill chips. Dates run inline after the role ('Senior Frontend Engineer | Apr 2022 - Feb 2026'). Small company logo marks beside each entry. Explicitly framed around the '6-second recruiter scan'; May 2026 changelog removed Hobbies and Date of Birth and restructured Skills.

name: CV / Resume Template ✨ (littlejudit.ux)
heading_treatment: allcaps + letterspaced, coral, small
name_treatment: large serif, left-aligned beside circular photo
notable: Most editorial of the set: serif display name/role against a sans body. Coral section labels + navy titles. Contact row uses envelope/LinkedIn/Instagram/portfolio glyphs; each entry's date is right-aligned behind a small calendar icon, company behind a building icon. Rounded card containers around summary/experience blocks.

name: CV / Resume (A4, PDF export)
heading_treatment: allcaps + letterspaced, tiny gray
name_treatment: large-left bold
notable: Narrow RIGHT sidebar (contact, Industry Knowledge, Tools & Technologies) rather than the usual left. Circular photo sits top-right opposite the name. Date line ('Aug 2018 - Present - 1 year, Paris') sits under the employer in muted slate. Sells on 'A4 format | Generic Fonts | PDF Export'.

name: CV Template for Figma
heading_treatment: titlecase bold, blue
name_treatment: reversed-on-band, mixed-weight white on blue ('David **Bond**')
notable: Classic reversed blue left sidebar (~1/3 width) with circular photo, name, and icon-led contact list (globe/envelope/phone/pin). Dates right-aligned in italic on the entry row. Bullet-marker dots in blue. Updated to Auto Layout in Feb 2021; markets 'PDF Export with Hyperlink'.

name: CV Resume Template 🦇
heading_treatment: allcaps + hairline rule + right-aligned section numbers (01, 02, 04, 05)
name_treatment: large-left, name and role set as one line ('John Doe, Full Stack Developer')
notable: The most art-directed file surveyed. Three-band grid: decorative line-art panel + contacts, then experience, then skills/languages. Numbered sections are a genuinely distinctive device. Ships color-swapped colorways (near-black/white and cream/orange). Uses large line-art graphics (wireframe globe, starburst) in place of a photo. Languages graded with CEFR levels (C2/C1/B2) right-aligned — the closest thing to a rating device in the whole survey, and it is text, not bars.

name: Simple Resume/CV Template
heading_treatment: titlecase, small, gray, plain (no rule)
name_treatment: large-left bold
notable: The resume artwork itself is fully monochrome — the mint green is only the cover backdrop. Narrow right column carries Education/Skills/Tools as plain unstyled lists. Company logo avatars (Discord) are the only icons. Deliberately plain and open source 'to help new designers start their career'.

name: Resume / CV Templates (Bebbble)
heading_treatment: allcaps tiny letterspaced (main column) + bold titlecase (sidebar)
name_treatment: large-left bold
notable: Photo slot is an illustrated circular avatar, not a photograph (blue and pink variants shown). Very dense, near-monochrome left sidebar stacking contact/Industry Knowledge/Tools/Other Skills/Languages/Social/Selected Projects. Ships parallel A4 and US Letter artboards side by side — the only file that shows both formats explicitly on the cover.

name: CV & Resume ATS Friendly (Menara Lintang Was)
heading_treatment: titlecase label set in a left margin column
name_treatment: small-left, role beneath
notable: Label-left / content-right grid with a dark navy rule across the top and a right-aligned contact stack. Read from a small in-page thumbnail only — the preview image asset is dead (0 bytes) on both the og:image and carousel CDN — so fine detail is lower confidence than the other entries. Multi-column structure sits awkwardly against its 'ATS Friendly' name.

name: ATS Friendly Resume (3 Free ATS Friendly Resumes)
heading_treatment: allcaps small-caps, centered, flanked by rules on both sides
name_treatment: large-centered serif
notable: The most genuinely ATS-consistent design surveyed: Times-like serif, pure black on white, centered name over a pipe-separated contact line, full-width rule. Technical Skills render as a four-column plain bullet grid inside the single column. Ships light and dark (near-black) variants. Experience block not visible in the preview, so date alignment is not recorded.

name: Free ATS Resume Template (Erlan Candra Haryanto)
heading_treatment: allcaps + rule
name_treatment: large, set beside a circular photo placeholder
notable: Contradicts its own ATS pitch: ships a circular photo placeholder and a row of decorative contact glyphs (phone/location/email/LinkedIn). Shown only as a rotated 3D paper mockup, so several attributes are read at an angle and date alignment could not be confirmed. Ships a second near-identical pale-teal colorway.

name: Single-Column Resume Template - ATS Friendly (Andrew Makasini)
heading_treatment: unknown
name_treatment: unknown
notable: HONESTY FLAG: the only published preview is a black-on-white marketing title card ('Resume Templates / ATS-friendly • Single-Column Format') — the actual resume artwork is never shown. Paging the embed viewer forward did not advance past the cover frame. 'single' columns is taken from the title/cover text and description; the photo/icons/bars values are inferred from a description that lists only Name Header, Job Title, Contact Info and Work Experience sections, NOT from seeing the layout. Treat all attributes here as low confidence.

name: ATS friendly Resume & Cover Letter template with components (Curriculum Vitae)
heading_treatment: titlecase bold
name_treatment: unknown
notable: Monochrome, typography-only, no ornament at all. Dates run inline inside the entry heading ('Hurb | 2022-2023 (Senior Design System Analyst)'), with an italic one-line company descriptor under it. Contact block is a stack of underlined links. Bundles a matching cover letter and is component-driven. Sample content is in Portuguese. Preview is heavily rotated/zoomed so the name header was not visible.

name: 6 ATS-Friendly Resume Templates for Designers (Sara & Hanieh)
heading_treatment: titlecase bold, several with a trailing hairline rule; one allcaps variant
name_treatment: large-left serif in the photo variant
notable: Six variants: mostly Experience-left / Skills+Education-right, with one sidebar variant. Dates right-aligned in italic on the entry row; skills as pill chips; one variant ships a black-and-white portrait photo and another a teal wave graphic. Markets itself as '100% ATS-scannable' while shipping precisely the features that break ATS parsing — see ats_claims.

name: White and Blue Resume
heading_treatment: allcaps bold; sidebar headings centered with rules, main headings preceded by a small circular target icon
name_treatment: large reversed white on royal-blue band, left
notable: Circular photo with blue ring overlapping a light-gray sidebar; name sits in a solid blue block with role beneath. Faint grid texture at right edge.

name: Blue Professional Engineer Resume
heading_treatment: allcaps light-blue in sidebar; title-case bold with underline rule in main column
name_treatment: allcaps letter-spaced dark navy on a light-blue horizontal band
notable: Rectangular (not circular) photo. Full-height dark navy sidebar. Contact details boxed between hairline rules.

name: Beige Black Vintage Gothic Resume
heading_treatment: title-case display serif, no rules, sitting inside ruled grid cells
name_treatment: very large blackletter/gothic display serif, centered
notable: Boxed quadrant grid divided by hairline rules — genuinely different from every other layout here. Decorative classical marble statue photo bleeds off bottom-right in place of a headshot. Role in an outlined pill. Ships with typo 'Skilss'.

name: Orange White Graphic Designer Resume
heading_treatment: allcaps small, set on a solid orange highlight bar behind the text
name_treatment: very large bold dark, left, overlapping an orange circle
notable: Header spans full width, then splits into two equal columns. Icon row (graduation cap / location pin / phone) for contact. Decorative sand-dune texture illustration across the bottom.

name: White and Blue  Curriculum Resume
heading_treatment: allcaps reversed white inside rounded blue pill/band blocks
name_treatment: allcaps white on royal blue, left
notable: One of only two templates with percentage skill bars (70%/90%/90%). Rounded-corner white cards floating on a blue field; bulleted dot icons on contact lines.

name: Purple Character Profile Resume
heading_treatment: allcaps serif with rules; sidebar heading centered on a lavender panel
name_treatment: very large serif, left, under a bracketed '[TITLE OF BOOK]' label
notable: NOT A RESUME. It is a fiction character-profile worksheet mis-filed in the resume collection — body copy reads 'Who is this character?', 'What are their motivations?', 'How do they grow or change throughout the novel?'. Sections are INTERESTS & EXPERIENCES / PERSONALITY & MOTIVATIONS / DEVELOPMENT / BACKGROUND & ENVIRONMENT. Evidence of weak collection curation.

name: Cream Student Resume
heading_treatment: title-case bold, each preceded by a peach line-art icon (person / graduation cap / lightbulb)
name_treatment: large dark serif-ish, right of a rectangular photo
notable: Stacked white card/panel layout on a cream ground — single column but heavily boxed. Dates sit in a dedicated left gutter column ('20XX'), the closest thing in the set to a date rail. Second of only two templates with skill rating bars, laid out two-up.

name: Black Resume
heading_treatment: large allcaps reversed white on black
name_treatment: very large allcaps dark on light-gray sidebar, left, with a short rule beneath
notable: Fully monochrome. Full-bleed black right panel with a vertical timeline line and dots marking each section — the only timeline device in the set. Large B&W portrait fills the top of the sidebar.

name: Black and White Professional Resume
heading_treatment: small allcaps bold, tight, no rules
name_treatment: large serif reversed white, stacked two lines in the navy sidebar
notable: Photo-free and very text-forward. Narrow dark navy rail carries only name/role/contact. Skills render as a plain three-column text grid at the bottom — no bars, no dots.

name: Orange Swiss Minimalist & Modern Lines Creative Resume
heading_treatment: allcaps orange with a rule above, Swiss-grid aligned
name_treatment: very large bold black, left, role in gray directly beneath
notable: Wide main column plus a narrow right rail. Photo is a cutout on an organic orange blob. Numbered awards 01-04. Contact set as three labeled columns under the name. Base layout shared with #13 and #15.

name: Blue Blank College Student Resume
heading_treatment: title-case teal bold with a thin rule beneath
name_treatment: large teal bold, left, stacked two lines
notable: Ships completely unfilled — literally 'Student Name', 'Job', 'Volunteer Title', 'Name Of Company', 'Dates'. A skeleton rather than a designed sample. Teal rules top and bottom. One of only two structurally ATS-safe layouts here.

name: Beige Assistant CV Resume A4
heading_treatment: title-case serif, understated, no rules
name_treatment: allcaps bold in the sidebar beneath the photo, left
notable: Large circular photo sits on an arch/dome shape motif that also frames the Profile block — the only arch device in the set. Warm taupe/beige palette. A4 rather than US Letter.

name: Purple Minimalistic Simple Student Resume
heading_treatment: allcaps purple bold, no rules
name_treatment: large purple bold, left, plain
notable: The cleanest genuinely ATS-safe template in the set: true single column, no sidebar, no photo, no graphics, no bars. Contact as a simple two-column text row. Prose-style sections. Ironically the least 'designed' template is the only one that would actually parse.

name: Black & White Minimalist Modern Bold Professional Resume
heading_treatment: title-case bold with a full-width rule beneath
name_treatment: very large bold, left, stacked two lines with allcaps role beneath
notable: Monochrome re-skin of #9/#15. B&W cutout portrait top-right. Numbered awards 01-04. Four-column contact/skills strip pinned to the bottom. Ships with typo '(2017-Precent)'.

name: Beige Marketing Resume
heading_treatment: allcaps navy serif bracketed by horizontal rules
name_treatment: large allcaps navy serif, stacked two lines, with a ruled role bar beneath
notable: Most ornamented template surveyed: diamond/sparkle motifs, a navy corner triangle, and rules punctuated by centered diamond dots between every entry. Circular ringed photo on a peach/cream sidebar.

name: Minimalist & Modern Lines Professional Resume
heading_treatment: title-case editorial serif with rules above and below
name_treatment: very large serif, right of a small square photo, role beneath
notable: Gold/yellow re-skin of the #9/#13 family, restyled with an editorial serif. Small square photo on a yellow block. Numbered awards 01-04 set in oldstyle numerals. Narrow left rail, wide right column.
